name: Hub Group, Inc.
summary: Hub Group, Inc. (HUBG) is a transportation and logistics company providing intermodal, trucking, and logistics services. The company operates as a surface transportation provider, offering freight solutions including intermodal transportation, managed transportation, final mile delivery, and freight brokerage services to shippers across North America.

products.name: Intermodal Transportation
products.description: Rail and truck intermodal freight transportation services across North America.

products.name: Managed Transportation
products.description: Outsourced transportation management and logistics solutions for shippers.

products.name: Final Mile Delivery
products.description: Last-mile delivery services for freight to end destinations.

products.name: Freight Brokerage
products.description: Brokerage services connecting shippers with carrier capacity.
